originalTitle: U.S. stock futures rise as Wall Street looks to extend its rally coming off the holiday weekend
summary: U.S. stock-index futures gained on Sunday, with Wall Street looking to extend last week’s gains.
content:
U.S. stock-index futures gained on Sunday, with Wall Street looking to extend last week’s gains.

Dow Jones Industrial Average futures YM00 were up about 75 points, or 0.1%, late Sunday. S&P 500 futures ES00 were up 0.5% while Nasdaq-100 futures NQ00 were 1.3% higher. Bitcoin BTCUSD was trading above the $63,000 level, up about 5% over the past week.
chineseTitle: 华尔街希望延续假期周末后的涨势，美国股指期货上涨
chineseSummary: 美国股指期货周日上涨，华尔街希望延续上周的涨幅。
chineseContent:
美国股指期货周日上涨，华尔街希望延续上周的涨幅。

周日晚间，道琼斯工业平均指数期货 YM00 上涨约 75 点，即 0.1%。标准普尔 500 指数期货 ES00 上涨 0.5%，纳斯达克 100 指数期货 NQ00 上涨 1.3%。比特币 BTCUSD 交易价格高于 63,000 美元水平，过去一周上涨约 5%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
